sections.paragraph:
(for גֵּוֶה, like בֵּן for בֵּנֶה from the root גָּוָה No. I.), const. גֵּו; with suff. גֵּוִי, גֵּוְךָ m.

(1) back, Pro 10:13 19:29 26:3 Isa 50:6 51:23 הִשְׁליךְ אַחֲרֵי גֵּו Isa 38:17 see under גַּו .

(2) [“prop. belly”], middle, midst; Job 30:5, מִן־גֵּז יְגֹרָשׁוּ “they are driven from among (men).”
